race.comment: BLUEPINOT (12) raced on the pace but lacked a change of gears when midfield over 1350m at Doomben a fortnight ago. Drops in class today and 1200m is more his go. Cherry ripe after three runs back and should play a key role. BALANCE THE BOOKS (6) had been building to a win and it came last time out in a BM78 over this trip at Ipswich. Needs a bit of luck slotting in from a tricky gate but if things go right she can win again. BREAK FREE (13) has been kept fresh since a game win at Doomben a month ago. Unbeaten in three visits to this venue so she must be considered despite a horror draw. SHOT OF WHISKEY (4) has been about the mark all prep and saves his best for this circuit.
